info.name: Interior AI Backend - MVP
info.description:
Complete API collection for the Interior AI Backend MVP.

FLOWS:
1. Empty room → Furnished with style
2. Furnished room → Redesign style
3. Generated image → Localized edit (change one element)
4. Scene analysis → Get structured inventory
5. Evaluate results manually

formdata.description: Select a JPEG/PNG/WebP photo of an interior (empty room or furnished)

item.name: 2. Generate — Style Redesign
item.description: Take an existing photo and redesign it with a different style. Works with empty rooms (adds furniture) or furnished rooms (replaces furniture).

item.name: 3. Generate — Functional Variant
item.description: Transform the room function (living room → dining room, bedroom → office, etc.)

item.name: Generate: Living Room with TV Wall
4. Generate — Localized Edit
item.description:
Change ONE specific element in an image. Use this on a generated variant to iterate.

TIP: First run Scene Analysis to get the inventory, then use localized_edit with specific instructions.

item.name: 5. Scene Analysis
item.description: Analyze an image to get a structured JSON inventory of the scene (furniture, architecture, editable elements).

item.name: 6. Compare Results
item.description: Compare original image with all generated variants.

item.name: 7. Evaluate Results
item.description: Manually score each generated variant on 10 dimensions (1-5 scale).

body.raw:
{
  "geometry": 5,
  "architecture": 4,
  "perspective": 4,
  "photorealism": 3,
  "commercial_quality": 4,
  "instruction_obedience": 5,
  "style_differentiation": 4,
  "localized_edit_accuracy": 3,
  "human_retouch_needed": 2,
  "construction_company_fit": 4,
  "verdict": "usable_with_retouch",
  "notes": "Good overall, needs minor color correction on walls"
}
